title: stelis hamiltonii
intro: Stelis hamiltonii, also known as the Hamilton's Stelis or Pico Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the island of Puerto Rico. It is a type of terrestrial orchid, typically growing to a height of 6-12 inches, with long, thin leaves and small white flowers. The medicinal properties of Stelis hamiltonii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use.
